config.title: Kreator inwentaryzacji #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'currentFirma #include "50203.h"
dim g_pStanMag dim g_result:g_result = false
dim g_currentObject:set g_currentObject = nothing dim g_currentIter:g_currentIter = -1
dim g_strWaluta:g_strWaluta = getCurrentFirma.pWaluta.strSkrot dim g_WalutaProduktu
function bufor(byref pBufor)
page_.ctrl(CTRLID_CENA).disable = true page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DATA).disable = true
set g_pStanMag = pBufor g_currentIter = 0 setCurrentObject() end function
function cancel page_.goback end function
function res() res = g_result end function
function setCurrentObject()
set g_currentObject = g_pStanMag.value(g_currentIter) with g_currentObject if .m_pProdukt is nothing then set .m_pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT , g_currentObject.m_nProduktIdobj) set .m_pOpak = .m_pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(g_currentObject.m_nOpakLp)
end if if .superata then .m_dData = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() end if #ifdef _IOW .m_curCena = ccur(.m_pOpak.curCenaBrutto3) g_WalutaProduktu = .m_pOpak.pWaluta.strSkrot #endif end with
if not g_currentObject.superata then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_CENA).disable = true page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DATA).disable = true else page_.ctrl(CTRLID_CENA).disable = false page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DATA).disable = false end if
end function
function nextObject() g_currentIter = g_currentIter + 1 if g_currentIter < g_pStanMag.upperIndex()+1 then setCurrentObject() else g_result = true cancel end if
end function
function prevObject() if g_currentIter > 0 then g_currentIter = g_currentIter - 1 setCurrentObject() end if
end function
XVBWIZZARD_TEXT_TRANSFER(CTRLID_PRODUKT,g_currentObject.produkt) XVBWIZZARD_TEXT_TRANSFER(CTRLID_OPAK,g_currentObject.opakowanie)
function c##CTRLID_ILOSC2##_ongetdata(byref pCtrl): c##CTRLID_ILOSC2##_ongetdata=true pCtrl.disable = true pCtrl.value = g_currentObject.m_curStanBaza pCtrl.unit = g_currentObject.m_pOpak.pJednOpak.strSkrot pCtrl.precision = g_currentObject.m_pOpak.pJednOpak.nDokladnosc-1 end function
function c##CTRLID_ILOSC##_ongetdata(byref pCtrl): c##CTRLID_ILOSC##_ongetdata=true pCtrl.value = g_currentObject.m_curStanFaktyczny pCtrl.unit = g_currentObject.m_pOpak.pJednOpak.strSkrot pCtrl.precision = g_currentObject.m_pOpak.pJednOpak.nDokladnosc-1 end function
function c##CTRLID_ILOSC##_ondataentered(byref pCtrl, varValue) : c##CTRLID_ILOSC##_ondataentered=true g_currentObject.m_curStanFaktyczny = ccur(varValue)
if not g_currentObject.superata then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_CENA).disable = true page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DATA).disable = true else page_.ctrl(CTRLID_CENA).disable = false page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DATA).disable = false end if
end function
function c##CTRLID_CENA##_ongetdata(byref pCtrl): c##CTRLID_CENA##_ongetdata=true pCtrl.value = g_currentObject.m_curCena #ifdef _IOW pCtrl.unit = g_WalutaProduktu #else pCtrl.unit = g_strWaluta #endif end function
function c##CTRLID_CENA##_ondataentered(byref pCtrl, varValue) : c##CTRLID_CENA##_ondataentered=true g_currentObject.m_curCena = ccur(varValue) end function
function c##CTRLID_DATA##_ongetdata(byref pCtrl): c##CTRLID_DATA##_ongetdata=true pCtrl.value = g_currentObject.m_dData end function
function c##CTRLID_DATA##_ondataentered(byref pCtrl, varValue) : c##CTRLID_DATA##_ondataentered=true g_currentObject.m_dData = cdate(varValue) end function

page.body:
XFORMMWIZZARDBEGIN(PICTURE_WIZZARD_IMP_FRM_STEP1)
XFORMMWIZZARD_TEXT(Nazwa / indeks produktu ) XFORMMWIZZARD_TEXT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PRODUKT)
QXR_SEPARATOR(1)
XFORMMWIZZARD_TEXT(Opakowanie/odmiana ) XFORMMWIZZARD_TEXT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_OPAK)
QXR_SEPARATOR(1)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Ilosc w bazie,1) QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_ILOSC2,20,0,,1)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Ilosc faktyczna,1) QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_ILOSC,20,0,,1)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Cena dostawy,1) QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_CENA,20,#*gvar_price_prec,,1)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Data ważności,1)
QXR_SEPARATOR(1) QXR_SEPARATOR(1)
QXC_BUTTON(-1,12,Poprzedni,varFunction="prevObject",1)
QXC_BUTTON(-1,12,Następny,varFunction="nextObject",1)
XFORMMWIZZARD_TABLESEND
XFCLOSEBUTTON_HNAME(cancel,Anuluj)
